MINI MINUTES:

Joan Martin, CRS # 6036

Ruling:

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JOSEPH SANDOVAL, JR., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, (415)554-3867, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
BRIAN M. JUNGINGER, ESQ.(MCINERNEY & DILLON), (510)465-7100, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, MITCHELL ENGINEERING

BEFORE THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE WORKS FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE AND HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. BOTH PATIES DID NOT OBJECT. THEREUPON, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
